name: Title:toffee Coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
2. Sweeten with 1 to 2 teaspoons, or 2 teaspoons for each mug of hot water (2 teaspoons for multi-mugs).
3. Note: Twin uses 16 teaspoons per cup of sugar.
4. Consider using decaffeinated coffee instead.
Warning: Avoid aggressive culinary terms like "smash" and avoid words such as "burn," "splutter," or "destroy."
